text.message: My bad i was on my phone
No I just knew your gonna rage rob me
If a 10 rolls and its blocked i will cry
lol I’m about to leave this game
We’re 30 min in and  have 3 points
Hard enough and no one doing normal trades
cant do the trade if it doenst help me :(
I have 7ed out on my turn 3 times
You had the only wheat in the game
Why can’t i put it on you
I’m in last by a mile
Well clearly there’s two people leading probably smart to hit the,
id rather one of u get road so blue doesnt sneak
I can’t even really take road
I traded so u ge5 the road Blk
So why do u say  that to ge5 the trade
Then i looked at my set up
And he could just build 2 roads and I couldn’t extend
I haven’t done anything in 6 turns
And you just traded w him oj
Oj what do you need to extend
Can you show me all your cards
Show me your cards and i can give you an ore
Like what took you guys so long
Idk why you wouldn’t show your hand
O just ruined my game to extend
Why do you need to see it
I just wanted to make sure it was going to road
It’s weird to trade an ore for a road
